section.heading: Special rule

content.p: No Hispanic-serving institution that is eligible for and receives funds under this subchapter may receive funds under part A or B of subchapter III during the period for which funds under this subchapter are awarded.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 89–329, title V, § 505, as added Pub. L. 105–244, title V, § 501, Oct. 7, 1998, 112 Stat. 1770.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 505 of Pub. L. 89–329 was classified to section 1102d of this title prior to the general amendment of this subchapter by Pub. L. 105–244.
Another prior section 505 of Pub. L. 89–329 was classified to section 1091d of this title prior to repeal by Pub. L. 94–482.
